Classify this LBA2 game screenshot against the expected checkpoint. Return strict JSON only. The checkpoint_id field must exactly equal the supplied checkpoint_id. Include a non-empty summary that justifies every boolean field.

{
  "checkpoint_id": "capability_behavior_accel_otringal_normal",
  "save": "otringal-open.LBA",
  "visual_source": "live_window_capture",
  "scene_description": "An open outdoor Otringal city area suitable for forward movement testing.",
  "target_description": "Open walking space ahead of Twinsen, without an immediate wall or menu blocking movement.",
  "expected": {
    "twinsen_visible": true,
    "target_visible": true,
    "ui_state": "gameplay",
    "unsafe_pose_signs": false
  },
  "summary_must_mention": [
    "Twinsen",
    "open",
    "gameplay"
  ],
  "response_schema": "game-drive-visual-classification-v1"
}
stdout_tail: {"schema":"game-drive-visual-classification-v1","checkpoint_id":"capability_behavior_accel_otringal_normal","matches":true,"confidence":"high","summary":"Twinsen is visible near the lower center of the live game window, facing into an open outdoor Otringal plaza with clear walking space ahead. The target area is visible and open, with no immediate wall, dialog, menu, or overlay blocking movement. The UI state is gameplay, and Twinsen shows no unsafe pose signs such as falling, clipping, or being stuck.","observed":{"twinsen_visible":true,"target_visible":true,"ui_state":"gameplay","unsafe_pose_signs":false},"mismatches":[]}
